窓から差し込んだ朝日が少女の顔を照らす。<br>ヒマリはまぶしげに薄く目を開けて:
Morning sunlight streamed through the window, lighting the girl's
face. Squinting, Himari opened her eyes and reached out a hand.
朝……いま、何時……？ 学校……行かなきゃ……。<br>そろそろ、スマホ……アラ:
Morning... what time is it...? I have to go to school... My smartphone
alarm is about to go off... Ah!
しかし彼女が手にしていたのは、<br>愛用していたスマホではなくシエナからもらっ:
However, what she held was not her usual smartphone, but the
communicator Shiena had given her.
そっか……。<br>学校、行かなくて……いいんだった……: Oh, right... I don't have to go to school anymore...
ヒマリはふと、昨日の大穴探索のことを思い出す。<br>戦闘中の情けない姿を思いだ:
Recalling yesterday's Abyss expedition and how pathetic she'd
looked, Himari let out an involuntary sigh.
（なんか、動く気になれない、かも。<br>このまま寝てようかな……）: (I don't really feel like moving. Maybe I'll just sleep in...)
（見つけたお菓子も、みんな検査で持って行かれちゃったし……。<br>久々に食べて:
(The snacks I found were all taken for inspection... I wanted to taste
them after so long...)
ノックもなく、勢いよく扉が開かれる。<br>室内に飛び込んできたのは満面の笑顔を:
Without a knock, the door flew open. Kururu burst into the room,
beaming broadly.
おはよー。<br>今日もお外はぽかぽかだよ～！: Good morning! It's warm and sunny outside today!
うん、いい天気みたいだね……？: Yeah, it seems like a nice day...
ヒマリ！<br>基地の探検に行こう！: Himari! Let's go explore the base!
うん！ だって、ヒマリいっつも部屋にいるでしょ？<br>だから一緒に探検するの！: Yeah! You're always in your room, right? So I'm taking you exploring!
えへへ～。<br>今日はクルルが基地の中、ぜーんぶ案内するから！: Ehehe. Today I'll show you everything in the base!
（勢いでついてきちゃったけど……やっぱり落ち着かないな、ここ。 <br>なんだか:
(I got swept up and came along, but... I still can't relax here.
Everyone seems a bit on edge...)
おいおい先週からまた値上がってるじゃねえか！ <br>こっちは命かけて戦ってんだ:
Hey, prices have gone up again since last week! We're the ones
risking our lives out here!
食堂が新しいメニューを開発するって、薪を買い上げてったんだ。 <br>追加が届く:
The cafeteria decided to develop a new menu, so they bought up all
the firewood. Use it sparingly until the restock arrives!
今日もわいわい賑やかだね～: It's lively and bustling again today!
（あちこちで危ない話をしてるし、みんな武器を持ってる。<br>あたりまえだよね…:
(I hear dangerous talk all around me, and everyone's carrying
weapons. I guess that's only natural... This is a battlefield after all...)
お買いものしていこ～！ <br>こっちこっち～！: Let's go shopping! Over here, over here!
みてみて～！ ここ、い～～ぱい、便利なもの売ってるんだよ！<br>これしってる～:
Look, look! They sell tons of useful stuff here! Do you know what this
is? It makes climbing rocky mountains super easy!
（登山の道具かな……？ こっちには罠みたいなものもあるし……。<br>なんか物騒:
(Climbing gear...? And there are trap-like things over there... They
sure sell a lot of dangerous stuff...)
ヒマリは、キラキラと光るクリスタルに目が留まる。: Himari's eyes were drawn to a sparkling crystal.
（普通の宝石が売ってる。<br>こういうアクセサリーもあるんだ）:
(They're selling ordinary gemstones. So they have accessories here
too.)
ほんとだー、ピカピカ光ってキレイだね～！<br>おばちゃん、これなーに？: Wow, it's sparkling and so pretty! Auntie, what's this?
それは採掘用の爆弾だよ。 <br>ちょいっと魔力を込めて、軽く投げればどかーんさ:
That's a mining bomb. Just put a little magic into it and toss it gently,
and *boom*.
（ば、爆弾か……。や、やっぱり物騒なモノだった……）: (A bomb... I knew it was something dangerous after all...)
すごいねー、便利かも！<br>ヒマリ、買っていく～～？: That's amazing, it might be useful! Himari, should we buy it?
彼女には宝石に見えた爆弾を、恐る恐る棚へ戻す。<br>ヒマリはもう商品に手を伸ば:
She warily put the bomb that looked like a gem back on the shelf.
Himari no longer felt like reaching for any more items.
ヒマリ！ 次はあっちにいこう！<br>クルルのお気に入りのところ、連れてくね！: Himari! Let's go over there next! I'll take you to my favorite spot!
ここはおいしーご飯を出してくれるところ！ <br>ねーねー、いつもの作ってー！:
This is the place that serves super yummy food! Hey hey, make me the
usual!
あら、クルルじゃない。<br>はいはい、ちょっと待ってなさいな。: Oh, if it isn't Kururu. Alright, wait a moment.
キッチンの奥から声がして、しばらくあと。<br>クルルはたっぷりとハチミツのかか:
A voice came from the back of the kitchen. After a while, Kururu
returned carrying bread heavily coated with honey.
ほら、ヒマリも食べて食べて！<br>クルル、これ大好きなんだ～！: Here, Himari, eat up! I love this sooo much!
勧められるままにパンを口にしたヒマリが、大きく目を見開く。: Encouraged, Himari took a bite of the bread and her eyes went wide.
（いつも食べてたハチミツよりずっと美味しく感じる。 <br>そっか……この世界は:
(It tastes much better than the honey I used to eat. That's right...
this world's nature is so abundant...)
ヒマリ、美味しいもの食べて元気出たよね。 <br>それじゃあ行こっか！: Himari, yummy food makes you feel better, right? Then let's go!
案内ご苦労さん。 <br>……ずいぶんと時間がかかったが、トラブルか？: Thanks for showing her around. ...It took a while, any trouble?
えー、何もないよ？ <br>楽しかったよね、ヒマリ？: No, nothing at all! It was fun, right Himari?
……たっぷり寄り道をしてたようだな？ <br>ったく、さっさと連れてこいって言っ:
...Seems like you took plenty of detours. Jeez, I told you to bring her
straight here.
ごめんなさーい。 <br>次はもうちょっと早く来るね！: Sorrryyy! Next time I'll come a little sooner!
もうちょっとって……改める気がないな、こいつ。 <br>ヒマリも付き合わせて悪か:
'A little sooner'... You've got no intention of changing, do you? Sorry
for dragging you along, Himari.
う、ううん。 <br>楽しかったよ……？: N-no, it's okay... It was fun, I think...?
そうか。 <br>ま、それなら良しとしておこう。: I see. Well, if that's the case, I'll let it slide.
（そんなに怒ってないみたい。<br>ヒマリのことも助けてくれたし……怖い人じゃな:
(He doesn't seem that angry. He saved me too... he's not scary,
right?)
さて、わざわざ来てもらったことだし、本題に入ろう。<br>大穴で見つかったこの鞄:
Well, since you came all the way here, let's get to the point. This bag
found in the Abyss... it seems to be the same as the ones from your world, doesn't it?
うん。スクールバッグだと思う……。<br>ヒマリたちの学校のとは違う色だけど……:
Yeah. I think it's a school bag... But the color is different from the
ones at our school...
中に入ってた袋も、調査の結果、危険性は特にないそうだ。<br>ヒマリの言ってたよ:
The bag inside was also inspected, and they said it's not dangerous.
Just like you said, it seems to contain snacks.
アーデルハイトが言うにはその袋の中身は食べられるらしいし、<br>ヒマリに渡して:
Adelheid says the contents of that bag are edible, so I'll hand them
over to you. They're your spoils, after all.
（これ……シエナが好きだったお菓子だ……。<br>今度、一緒に食べようかな……）:
(These are the snacks Shiena liked... Maybe I'll eat them with her
sometime...)
食べものなの～？ それ、おいしいやつ～？: It's food? Is it the tasty kind?
うん。美味しいよ。<br>あとでみんなで分けて食べようね？: Yeah, they're good. Let's share them with everyone later, okay?
（戦利品って言ってたけど、わたしは何もしてない……。<br>これを食べる権利があ:
(He called them spoils, but I didn't do anything... Kururu's the one
who deserves to eat them, right...)
……ヒマリ。<br>まだ昨日のこと、気にしてるのか？: ...Himari. Are you still bothered by what happened yesterday?
うん……だって、何もできなかったし……: Yeah... I mean, I couldn't do anything...
ヒマリが元いた世界は、もっともっと平和な世界だったんだろ？<br>急に生活が変わ:
The world you came from was much more peaceful, wasn't it? Your life
changed suddenly. It's only natural to be confused.
クルルと一緒に基地なのかを色々見て回ったんだろ？<br>感想はどうだ？:
You went around the base with Kururu and saw all sorts of things,
right? What did you think?
いろいろと……驚いた……: I was surprised by a lot of things...
みんなピリピリしてて、ちょっと怖いなって……。<br>売ってるものも物騒なものば:
Everyone's on edge, and it was kinda scary... And everything they
sold was dangerous...
ああ、それは仕方ない。<br>ここは厄災に対抗する最前線、特殊な場所だからな。:
Yeah, that can't be helped. This is the front line against the Calamity,
a special place.
他の街には、もう少し娯楽もあって、<br>ヒマリの住みやすい場所もあるかもしれな:
In other towns, there might be more entertainment, and there might
be places that are easier for you to live in.
ヒマリ。お前は、無理に戦うことはない。<br>もっと安全な場所に移り住んでもいい:
Himari. You don't have to force yourself to fight. You could move to a
safer place, you know?
え～～！ クルル、ヒマリと一緒がいいよ～。: Ehhh! I want to be with Himari!
俺としても、ヒマリにはここに残ってもらいたいけどな。: Personally, I'd like you to stay here too.
ヒマリ。俺はな、この前線基地を、<br>どこよりも安全で平和な場所にしたいと思っ:
Himari. I want to make this Frontline Base a safer and more peaceful
place than anywhere else.
ああ。楽しいことでいっぱい、美味しいものでいっぱい。<br>毎日生きてて良かった:
Yeah. A place full of fun, full of delicious food. A place where you
feel glad to be alive every day. That's what I want to make it.
ヒマリの元いた世界って、そういう場所だったんだろ？: The world you came from was like that, wasn't it?
ヒマリの住んでいた街のこと、もっと詳しく教えてくれないか？<br>そんな平和でみ:
Could you tell me more about the town you lived in? I want to try to
create a peaceful, livable place like that too.
え……？ ヒマリの住んでた街みたいにしたいってこと？<br>この場所を……？: Eh...? You want to make it like the town I lived in? This place...?
え～、なにそれ～！ それ、たのしそ～！: Ehh, what's that! That sounds fun!
（しれーかん、やっぱりいい人だ。<br>この基地の人たちのこと、こんなに思って…:
(The Commander really is a good person. He cares so much about the
people in this base...)
そこで、まずヒマリたちの世界のことを知るうえでだ。<br>その、袋のお菓子を、少:
So, in order to learn more about your world...could you share some of
that bag of snacks with me?
あはは！ なーんだ、ご主人さまも食べたかったんだ～！: Ahaha! So that's it—Master wanted to eat some too!
いや、そりゃ気になるだろ？<br>俺だって、どんな味がするのか興味ある。: Well, I'm curious, you know? I'm interested in what they taste like too.
あははっ！ うん、分かった。<br>みんなで食べようね。: Ahaha! Yeah, I got it. Let's all eat together, okay?
初めて見るスナック菓子に目を輝かせ、<br>夢中で頬張るクルルと<user>。:
Their eyes sparkling at the snack food they'd never seen before,
Kururu and ate it with gusto.
それはヒマリにとって、どこか懐かしい喧騒だった――: For Himari, it was a strangely nostalgic commotion—
